description_long: This object is a sleek, modern airplane with a sharply pointed nose and a streamlined fuselage, designed for high-speed flight. The wings are sharply swept back in a delta configuration, blending smoothly into the body, and there are no visible engines mounted on the wings or fuselage. The tail features a prominent vertical stabilizer with two angled horizontal stabilizers forming a V-tail arrangement. The surface appears smooth and reflective, suggesting a metallic or composite construction. There are no visible windows, doors, or landing gear, giving it a minimalist, possibly unmanned or stealth-oriented appearance. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced military or experimental aircraft, optimized for aerodynamic efficiency.
description: A sleek, delta-wing airplane with a pointed nose, V-tail, and smooth, reflective surface, lacking visible engines or landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply swept delta wing, pointed nose, and prominent V-tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide delta wingspan, narrow fuselage, and the V-tail's angled stabilizers extending upward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the delta wing and V-tail configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the V-tail's full structure, the trailing edge of the delta wing, and the absence of visible engines or landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-mounted, sharply swept delta wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engines present on the fuselage or wings.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and two upward-angled horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy integrated into the fuselage.
